reproducibility: real repo + pinned vuln/patched SHAs; line-precise; pin-or-drop.

seed_swap.reason: CPython-internal filter-logic bug, not user-code Tar-Slip; a user-code rule cannot rediscover it. Swapped for a genuine user-code Zip-Slip.

seed.sink: const dest = path.join(output, x.path) then fsP.writeFile(dest, x.data)/fsP.link/fsP.symlink — archive member path x.path joined to output and written with no containment (also arbitrary write through a symlink; CWE-22 + CWE-59)
seed.patched_shape: realpath both the destination dir and output (Promise.all([fsP.realpath(path.dirname(dest)), fsP.realpath(output)])) and throw unless realDestinationDir.indexOf(realOutputDir) === 0 — realpath containment that also defeats symlink escape

heldout.sink: Utils.writeFileTo(pth.resolve(targetPath, entryName), content, overwrite) in extractAllTo/extractAllToAsync — the ZIP entry name is joined to targetPath via pth.resolve and written with no containment check (Zip-Slip). Same pattern at the extractEntryTo write of `target`.
heldout.patched_shape: add `if(!pth.resolve(targetPath, entryName).startsWith(targetPath)) throw Utils.Errors.INVALID_FILENAME` (and `if(!target.startsWith(targetPath))`) before each write — resolve+startsWith containment guard

heldout.sink: filepath = self._directory.joinpath(filename).resolve() in PathResource._handle — the user-supplied URL path segment `filename` is joined to the static root and served; the relative_to() containment only runs when not self._follow_symlinks, so with follow_symlinks=True there is no containment (serve-file-by-user-path traversal)
heldout.patched_shape: always contain: normalized_path = Path(os.path.normpath(unresolved_path)); normalized_path.relative_to(self._directory) before resolve on the follow_symlinks branch too (os.path.normpath + Path.relative_to containment on every path)

heldout.sink: filepath = os.path.join(root, *filename.split('/')) then open(filepath, 'wb') in _unzip_iter — each ZIP member name from zf.namelist() is joined to root and opened for write with no containment (Zip-Slip in the NLTK downloader)
heldout.patched_shape: delete the manual per-member extraction loop and replace it with zf.extractall(root), which uses zipfile's member-name sanitization (safe-extract) instead of the raw join+open
